thought: Blend the first-frame battle state with the scraped motion reference by preserving the exact vertical top-down board composition, top UI, bottom featured heroes, and bottom-to-top clash direction, then borrowing only the reference video's execution rhythm: fixed camera, short anticipation, fast AoE expansion, brief lingering damage zone, soft particle decay, and tiny hit-confirm screen shake. The scene should not restart; it must continue the already-active exchange in the upper-middle lane. I selected only essential assets under the limit: the first frame for composition lock, the reference video for timing/camera rhythm, one bottom hero attack sheet for the next upgraded skill release, one enemy hit/disappear sheet for resolving weakened enemies, one fire/vortex VFX sheet for the persistent central AoE, one floating damage UI set for dense combat text, one top UI feedback pack for hit confirmation at the top, and one battle board layer pack for stable layered depth. Actions stay slow and readable in a game-like way: maintain pressure, trigger one stronger skill beat, then clear several enemies and push the frontline slightly upward. This keeps the cute vertical auto-battler style, clear physics feedback, stable anatomy, and no composition drift.
prompt_en: First Frame: @0ebd351c98744ae5854d360c18d449c5.png. Reference Video: @trimmed_best_ref_1774793728.mp4. Motion Style Reference: use the reference only for execution rhythm and camera behavior—fixed vertical top-down battle view, short anticipation before skill trigger, fast area-effect expansion, 0.8-1.5s lingering energy zone, soft particle drift and fade, dense readable hit feedback, and subtle hit-confirm micro shake—while strictly continuing the exact mid-battle state from the first frame. Preserve the original first-frame composition and arrangement, keep the top UI anchored at the top, the two featured chibi allies anchored at the bottom foreground, the congested clash in the upper-middle lane, and all motion flowing bottom-to-top along the same vertical axis. cute stylized cartoon, vertical screen mobile layout, bright blue-green-white fantasy palette with saturated orange promo frame, 2.5D chibi auto-battler, sharp clean edges, 4K ultra HD, cinematic game trailer texture, rich details, no jitter, stable face without deformation, clear facial features, normal anatomical structure, natural proportions, non-stiff movement. [00s-02s] (Background Layer) Start from @0ebd351c98744ae5854d360c18d449c5.png as the locked first frame, keep @battle_board_layers_221959.png aligned to the same board depth and lane positions, no camera pan, only a very slight fixed-view breathing emphasis. (Character/Action Layer) The current frontline in the upper-middle continues absorbing hits; bottom featured heroes hold their positions and charge the next attack without changing placement. (VFX Layer) The existing center fire column and right-side blue vortex persist briefly using @aoe_vfx_fire_vortex_sheet_221743.png, with a quick 0.2-0.4s pulse expansion like the reference rhythm. (UI Layer) Rapid stacked damage numbers continue popping over the upper-middle enemies with @floating_damage_ui_set_221826.png, while @top_ui_hit_feedback_221911.png gives tiny reactive flashes near the top battle UI. [02s-04s] (Background Layer) Keep the battlefield stable and readable in the same vertical composition, with no scene transition. (Character/Action Layer) One bottom featured chibi hero releases an upgraded attack from the lower center using @bottom_hero_attack_sheet_221615.png, aimed straight upward into the crowded upper-middle enemy cluster; the motion is game-like and readable, with a short anticipation then clean release. (VFX Layer) The central AoE intensifies: the fire-vortex zone blooms outward, overlaps the right-center swirl, and forms a brighter impact core on contact. Add a brief, subtle screen micro shake at the exact hit confirm, then let particles hover and dissipate. (UI Layer) Larger critical damage numbers and combo-style hit pops stack densely above the impacted enemies, clear and legible, with a brief top-side feedback pulse in the UI. [04s-06s] (Background Layer) The board remains locked to the same original framing and lane grid. (Character/Action Layer) Enemies in the upper-middle lane recoil from the impact force, stagger back slightly, then several weakened goblin-like units vanish in place using @enemy_hit_disappear_sheet_221701.png; surviving allied units nudge the frontline a little upward, not too far. (VFX Layer) The fire-vortex energy contracts, leaves glowing residue, then fades naturally with soft particles. (UI Layer) Floating damage text resolves into a final cluster of numbers, small defeat feedback appears where enemies disappear, and the top UI remains fixed and readable. End on an active but stabilized battle state ready for the next short engagement.
prompt_zh: > 首帧锁定: @0ebd351c98744ae5854d360c18d449c5.png。参考视频: @trimmed_best_ref_1774793728.mp4。动作风格参考: 仅提取参考视频的执行节奏与镜头方式——固定竖屏俯视战斗视角、技能触发前短前摇、范围特效快速铺开、0.8-1.5秒的持续停留、粒子轻微漂浮后自然衰减、密集但清晰的受击反馈、命中瞬间轻微微震——同时必须严格延续首帧中的当前战斗状态，不能重新开始。保持首帧原有构图与排布不变，顶部UI固定在上方，两个底部Q版主英雄固定在前景底部，战斗焦点保持在上中部拥挤交战区，所有攻击与推进方向严格沿着原始竖轴自下向上。整体风格为Q萌卡通、竖屏手游布局、蔚蓝星球明亮蓝绿白配色与橙色宣传边框、2.5D塔防自动战斗质感、边缘清晰、4K超清、电影级游戏宣传质感、细节丰富、无抖动，面部稳定不变形，五官清晰，结构正常，比例自然，动作不僵硬。[00s-02s] （背景层）从 @0ebd351c98744ae5854d360c18d449c5.png 的当前画面直接续接，使用 @battle_board_layers_221959.png 保持同样的棋盘纵深与格位关系，不移动镜头，只做极轻微的固定视角呼吸感强调。 （角色/动作层）上中部前线继续承受互相攻击，底部两个主打Q版英雄保持原位蓄力，不改变站位。 （特效层）用 @aoe_vfx_fire_vortex_sheet_221743.png 延续中央火焰立柱与右侧蓝色旋涡效果，参考视频节奏做一次0.2-0.4秒的快速脉冲扩张。 （UI层）用 @floating_damage_ui_set_221826.png 在上中部敌群上持续叠加飘字和伤害数字，并用 @top_ui_hit_feedback_221911.png 让顶部战斗UI出现轻微命中反馈闪动。[02s-04s] （背景层）战场保持稳定、清晰、竖屏俯视构图，不切场景。 （角色/动作层）一个底部主英雄从下方中部使用 @bottom_hero_attack_sheet_221615.png 释放一次升级技能，朝上中部拥挤敌群直线打出；动作是游戏化、清楚易读的短前摇后释放。 （特效层）中央范围伤害强化，火焰与旋涡叠加扩散，在命中点形成更亮的爆发核心；命中确认瞬间加入轻微屏幕微震，然后让能量粒子短暂停留后慢慢消散。 （UI层）上中部密集跳出更大的暴击数字与连击飘字，同时顶部UI出现一次短促反馈脉冲。[04s-06s] （背景层）棋盘与原始构图完全锁定，不改变布局。 （角色/动作层）上中部敌人在受力后出现明显反馈：先被击中、轻微后仰、向后踉跄，随后数个残血哥布林类单位使用 @enemy_hit_disappear_sheet_221701.png 原地消散；存活的我方单位仅小幅向上推进，不要推进过远。 （特效层）中央火焰旋涡能量收束，留下少量发光残留，再以柔和粒子自然淡出。 （UI层）飘字与伤害数字收束成最后一波结算反馈，敌人消失位置出现简洁击破提示，顶部UI始终固定清晰。结尾停在“战斗仍在继续但此轮局部交锋已结算”的状态，准备进入下一次短节奏交战。
